# PERF-160 negative: sql.Open at package scope with connection pool settings
lang: go
file: PERF-160-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

var db, _ = sql.Open("postgres", "host=localhost")

func init() {
	db.SetMaxOpenConns(25)
	db.SetMaxIdleConns(25)
	db.SetConnMaxLifetime(5 * 60 * 1000)
}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = db
}
